name: ILNodeSetSigGroupOperationMode
title: ILNodeSetSigGroupOperationMode
syntax: long ILNodeSetSigGroupOperationMode(char signalGroupName[], long mode, long param);
description: Sets specific operation mode in the interaction layer for the specified signal group.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: mode - 0: influences update bits; other values have currently no effect and are reserved.
0: all update bits will be set or reset depending on the signal updates 1: all update bits will always be sent with value = 1
0: the update bit of the signal group will be set or reset depending on the signal updates 1: the update bit of the signal group will always be sent with value = 1
0: the update bit will be set or reset depending on the signal updates 1: the update bit will always be sent with value = 1

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
